headline: Is Governance Tensions And Ariel’s Exit Altering The Investment Case For Eversource Energy (ES)?
summary: In late March 2026, Eversource Energy filed a definitive proxy statement urging shareholders to vote against a proposal requiring permanent separation of the Chairman and CEO roles, while Ariel Investments' Global Fund exited its position citing operational headwinds and weakening indicators after earlier expectations tied to asset divestitures and an offshore wind project. This combination of governance debate and a high-profile fund exit highlights growing investor scrutiny of Eversource’s...
